title: Quest Alliance is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Quest Alliance is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quest Alliance family as a Subject Matter Expert in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quest Alliance:
Quest Alliance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance!
